ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Rs.5,000 debited from your account on 15-04-2026
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

Aapke account se Rs.5,000 ka transaction 15-04-2026 ko 10:23 AM par hua. Agar aapne is transaction ko authorize nahi kiya hai, to turant hamare customer support se sampark karein.

Dhanyavaad,
ABC Bank

spam.subject: URGENT: Microsoft 365 Password Expiry - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear User,

Microsoft 365 account password will expire in 5 days. To avoid disruption, please update your password by clicking the secure link below.

<URL>

If you do not update, your account will be locked.

Thank you,
Microsoft Support
